name: deadleaf_13b10_experimental_shape_profile
purpose: Experimental MTF-shape correction profile that gates a constrained mid-band boost / high-band attenuation by measured high-frequency noise share.
notes: This profile keeps the current acutance noise-share model and high-frequency guard unchanged.
The correction is post-MTF and post-acutance-anchor, so it is kept as an experimental profile rather than replacing the base profile.
It improved overall MTF20/30/50, acutance curve MAE, Computer Monitor MAE, and preset mean on the 40-file benchmark.
The ori subset still shows a slight curve regression, so this profile remains opt-in.
